caption: A presentation slide titled "Logging Processing in Kubernetes" with the subtitle "Read Logs from the Filesystem or Journal" is displayed, while a small inset video in the upper right corner shows a person wearing a light-colored shirt. The slide illustrates a technical architecture featuring a "Master" node represented by a blue Kubernetes logo and a "Node" containing "Pod 1" and "Pod N". Red arrows point from these pods toward a "Fluent Bit Pod," which is identified by a blue bird logo. Beside these arrows is the text "/var/log/containers/*" and "Read Logs". Between the first and third frames, the presentation remains static. In the final frame, a new red arrow appears, originating from the "Master" node and arching over the central node to point directly at the "Fluent Bit Pod."
